title: Community funded
description: Some of the Cooperative's coffee bags contributed by members to run the day to day activities of the cooperative.

title: Internationally Eyed
description: Financed by UNDP and the Government of Uganda through UGACOF to build a solar dryer for our farmers.

title: Extension services
description: Meeting with community members to discuss about circular agriculture.

title: Solar Dryer
description: For members' produce to reduce post harvest losses due to weather conditions and improve quality of the produce by avoiding drying produce on the ground.
